events.event_description: The American consulate at Lusaka was elevated to Embassy status upon Zambia's attainment of independence, with Robert C. Foulon as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on October 24, 1964, when the American consulate at Lusaka was elevated to Embassy status with Robert C. Foulon as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
